changes: Changed the visible dependency section from a pip install command to a note that the workspace already provides the required Python packages.
Applied the same no-install wording to README.EN.md, README.CN.md, and SKILL.cn.md.
Changed optional PDF-output guidance in SKILL.md so it does not ask the executor to install optional packages.
skills.reason: The task setup service preinstalls these packages, and the task should not require the executor to install dependencies during the run.

changes: Reworded a README sentence that said the skill has no pip/npm installs so it no longer contains task-time package-install command text.
skills.reason: The skill remains zero-dependency; this avoids executor-visible install-command noise during benchmark auditing.
